claims: The skill requests permission to run arbitrary Bash commands (via the "Bash" allowed tool) for the stated purpose of creating OKR trackers. While file reading, writing, and editing may be necessary for generating configurations or code, unrestricted Bash access is excessive and unrelated to the core function. This could allow execution of any system command, posing unnecessary security risks beyond the scope of providing guidance, generating code, or validating outputs for OKR tracker creation.
